falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 (200-day moving average) by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the 'bottom' pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 65+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would indicate a topping action, directly opposing the bottom pattern analysis

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A meaningful divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the current pattern-based verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
